nodes.label: LangChain tools that wrap the ticket-system service for use by agents.  These to
List every ticket in a project as compact rows (id, title, status).      USE WHE
Fetch one ticket by UUID.      USE WHEN: You need to read subtasks or RITE test
Fetch one ticket's summary — no subtask trees, no full RITE specs.      USE WHEN
Create a new ticket in DRAFT status owned by the given project.      USE WHEN: Y
Transition a ticket to a new status. Valid: draft, in_review, questions_pending,
Append a clarification question to a ticket and mark it questions_pending.
A single RITE-format test case the lead must specify per subtask.
Arguments for create_subtask. Every field labelled REQUIRED must be supplied.
Create an ordered subtask under a ticket using RITE-format test cases.      USE
Update a subtask's status. Valid: pending, in_progress, done, blocked.
Lead-only patch tool for fixing an existing subtask in place.
Patch fields on an existing subtask. Lead-only tool.      Use this when an exist
Delete a subtask that's wrong or no longer needed. Lead-only tool.      Refuses
Append a todo (low-level step) to a subtask.
Return the next pending subtask (lowest order_index) for a ticket, optionally fi
Return the next pending subtask for a role across the whole project.      USE WH
List subtasks filtered by project_id and optionally ticket_id and/or assigned_to
